meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: Gaza’s unseen casualties: A surge in stillbirths and birth defects
items.summary: Gaza sees a 140% rise in stillbirths and a doubling of congenital anomalies as the devastating impacts of war linger.

items.title: LeBron James nets 28, Lakers grab 2-0 lead on Rockets in NBA Playoff series
items.summary: Kevin Durant scores 23 for Houston but the Lakers bag a 101-94 win despite a depleted team, with Luka Doncic missing.

items.title: Israel’s ‘digital occupation’ of south Lebanon
items.summary: Al Jazeera’s Linh Nguyen explains Israeli drones above the skies in Lebanon, which critics call a "digital occupation."

items.title: How China is gaining from Iran war by showing it is different from US
items.summary: Beijing has leveraged its strong economic relationship with the US, Israel, Iran and the Gulf to keep its stakes safe.

items.title: Iran’s UN ambassador responds to US ceasefire extension
items.summary: Iran’s UN Ambassador has responded to US President Donald Trump’s announcement of an extension to the ceasefire.

items.title: US halts shipment of Iraq’s oil dollars to curb Iran-linked groups: WSJ
items.summary: A plane carrying nearly $500m in US banknotes was blocked by the US Treasury, according to The Wall Street Journal.

items.title: World Cup host Mexico pledges security at tourist sites after shooting
items.summary: Mexican president admits the archaeological site outside Mexico City lacked security measures to prevent the attack.

items.title: Is Bangladesh killing reforms introduced after student-led protests?
items.summary: A new parliament has cancelled several reforms that were brought in after Hasina's ouster to improve accountability.

items.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 54 as Trump extends ceasefire?
items.summary: Trump said the US would extend the ceasefire with Iran until it presents a proposal and talks conclude.

items.title: FBI chief denies allegations of drinking and negligence
items.summary: FBI Director Kash Patel denied he was ever ‘intoxicated on the job’ or absent from duty.

items.title: Video of Anne Hathaway saying ‘Inshallah’ goes viral
items.summary: A video of Anne Hathaway saying ‘Inshallah’ has gone viral on social media.

items.title: FIFA unlocks more World Cup tickets and adds new, more expensive categories
items.summary: Football's governing body puts more tickets on sale but has introduced new premium-priced tiers that angered some fans.

items.title: Tehran held military parades as ceasefire was set to end
items.summary: Videos show large crowds attending a military parade in Tehran on Tuesday as the US-Iran ceasefire deadline approached.

items.title: Argentina’s Milei sings and lights torch for Israeli national day
items.summary: Argentine President Javier Milei sang and lit a ceremonial torch at Israel's 78th Independence Day celebrations.

items.title: Trump extends ceasefire and hopes for ‘unified proposal’
items.summary: In a social media post, President Trump announced an extension of the ceasefire in the war on Iran.

items.title: Iran war live: Trump says ceasefire extended as talks with Tehran in limbo
items.summary: Lebanon's disaster management unit raises death toll from weeks of Israeli attacks to 2,454, with 7,658 people injured.

items.title: Trump remains ‘in a quandary’ despite Iran war ceasefire extension
items.summary: Barbara Slavin says Trump’s decision to extend a ceasefire with Iran is a relief, but a diplomatic solution is far off.

items.title: Paraguay plans to accept 25 third-country migrant deportees from US
items.summary: The Trump administration has signed multimillion-dollar deals with foreign countries to accept non-citizen deportees.

items.title: Trump administration sues Southern Poverty Law Center on fraud charges
items.summary: The civil rights group has long been a target for conservative activists, who object to its characterisations.

items.title: Peru’s election chief steps down amid frustration over long vote count
items.summary: Ballot delivery delays and other missteps on election day have contributed to frustration with electoral authorities.

items.title: Real Madrid close on Barcelona as Mbappe and Vinicius net against Alaves
items.summary: Real Madrid beat relegation-threatened Alaves 2-1 in La Liga to close the gap with leaders Barcelona to six points.

items.title: Myanmar’s military government rebuffed on peace talks offer
items.summary: Min Aung Hlaing elected by parliament as president earlier this month after election derided as a sham.

items.title: Pro-Palestine legal aid requests stay high in 2025 amid US campus pressure
items.summary: Legal aid group says the rate of requests shows pro-Palestine advocacy persists despite Trump administration's tactics.

items.title: Nearly 8,000 people died or disappeared on migration routes in 2025: IOM
items.summary: More than four in every 10 deaths and disappearances occurred on sea routes to Europe, UN agency says.

items.title: US issues more Iran sanctions on eve of possible talks in Pakistan
items.summary: The Trump administration targets 14 individuals and entities over alleged links to Iran's arms industry.
